name: File Viewer
description: Open documents right inside luma: read PDFs page by page, view Word documents and Excel workbooks, zoom into images and SVGs, and browse any text or code file — no external apps needed.
details:
File Viewer turns luma into a quick reading pane for almost anything on your disk. Pick a file and it renders right there — no waiting for a heavy external app to start.

PDFs open page by page with selectable text and simple previous/next navigation. Word documents (.docx) are rendered with their headings, bold text, bullet lists and tables intact. Excel workbooks (.xlsx) show up as a scrollable grid with the header row highlighted.

Images (PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP, BMP) and SVGs get a zoomable, pannable canvas with a transparency checkerboard. Plain text and code files — from .txt and .md to .dart, .py and .json — display in a clean monospace view.

Anything the viewer can't render can still be launched in its default app with one click via Open externally.
